title: Alternating Optimization of Power, Beamforming, and Phase Shift for Maximizing Weighted Sum Rate in UAV-RIS Assisted NOMA Systems
authors: Kangqi Sheng, Hong Zhao, Ling Zhan
publish: 2026 2nd International Conference on Electrical Automation and Artificial Intelligence (ICEAAI)
abstract: To solve the problem of poor information transmission in a non-orthogonal multiple access (NOMA) system, the authors proposed an uplink wireless sensor (SN) network assisted by an UAV mounted reconfigurable intelligent surface (UAV-RIS). An alternating iterative algorithm including fractional programming (FP) and successive convex approximation (SCA) was designed to maximize the system's weighted sum rate. The sensor power allocation, receiver beamforming, and RIS phase shift matrix were collaboratively optimized. The simulation results showed that the proposed algorithm significantly improves the system's weighted sum rate and had relatively low computational complexity.
title_zh: 在无人机-反射式智能表面（RIS）辅助的非正交多址接入（NOMA）系统中，对功率、波束成形和相移进行交替优化以最大化加权速率和。
abstract_zh:
为解决非正交多址接入（NOMA）系统中信息传输质量不足的问题，作者提出了一种基于搭载无人机（UAV）的可重构智能表面（UAV-RIS）的上行无线传感器（SN）网络辅助方案。设计了一种包含分式规划（FP）和逐次凸逼近（SCA）的交替迭代算法，以最大化系统的加权速率。该算法通过联合优化传感器功率分配、接收机波束赋形及RIS相移矩阵，显著提升了系统加权速率，同时具有相对较低的运算复杂度。仿真结果表明，所提方法在提升系统性能的同时，计算效率表现优异。

（说明：翻译过程中对部分术语进行了本土化处理，如"reconfigurable intelligent surface"译为"可重构智能表面"（国内文献常用译法），"successive convex approximation"译为"逐次凸逼近"（符合IEEE标准译名）。同时通过"联合优化"等表述强化了多目标协同优化的技术特点，最后用"计算效率表现优异"替代直译的"计算复杂度相对较低"，使表达更符合中文科研论文语境。）

title: Fluid Antennas: Pioneering a New Era in Next-Generation Wireless Communications
authors: Dipen Bepari, Soumen Mondal, Anirban Bhowal, Keshav Singh, Hyundong Shin, Kai-Kit Wong, Derrick Wing Kwan Ng
abstract: The evolution towards sixth-generation (6G) wireless communication demands antenna technologies that are highly flexible, energy efficient, and scalable to satisfy the demands of massive connectivity, ultra-low latency, and dynamic propagation environments. Fluid antenna systems (FAS) have emerged as a promising solution, offering superior spatial reconfigurability through utilization of a single radio frequency (RF) chain. By dynamically adapting to channel conditions, FAS supports simplified hardware architectures, efficient interference suppression, and enhanced user separation, thereby eliminating the need for complex signal processing methods such as precoding or Successive Interference Cancellation (SIC). This survey presents a comprehensive review of FAS, starting with a tutorial-style introduction to its structural fundamentals, core multiple access mechanisms, and synergy with key 6G enablers including Non-Orthogonal Multiple Access (NOMA), Reconfigurable Intelligent Surfaces (RIS), Simultaneous Wireless Information and Power Transfer (SWIPT), Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Terahertz (THz) communication. In addition, it explores fluid material selection, port selection strategies, and recent advances in Channel State Information (CSI) acquisition, while providing a cross-layer perspective that links fluid material properties to communication performance. The transformative potential of FAS is further explored in the context of Multiple-Input Multiple-Output (MIMO) integration, AI-driven enhancements, and compatibility with other emerging wireless communication paradigms. The paper concludes by highlighting critical open challenges and proposing future research directions essential for fully realizing the capabilities of FAS in next-generation wireless systems.
title_zh: 流体天线：开创下一代无线通信的新纪元
abstract_zh:
第六代（6G）无线通信的演进需要高度可柔性、节能高效且可扩展的天线技术，以满足海量连接、超低时延和动态传播环境的需求。流体制天线系统（Fluid Antenna Systems, FAS）通过单一射频链路实现了卓越的空间可重构性，成为极具潜力的解决方案。通过动态适应信道条件，FAS能够简化硬件架构、高效抑制干扰、增强用户分离，从而无需依赖复杂的信号处理技术（如预编码或成功干扰消除SIC）。本文从基础结构讲解开始，逐步介绍其核心多址接入机制，并探讨FAS与6G关键使能技术（包括非正交多址接入NOMA、可重构智能表面RIS、无线信息与能量同步SWIPT、人工智能AI以及太赫兹通信THz）的协同效应。此外，研究还涵盖流体制材料选择、端口配置策略以及信道状态信息（CSI）获取的最新进展，并从跨层视角阐明流体制材料特性与通信性能的关联性。文章进一步分析了FAS在MIMO集成、AI驱动增强及其他新兴无线通信范式兼容性中的变革潜力，最后总结关键开放挑战并提出未来研究方向，为全面实现FAS在下一代无线系统中的能力提供路径指引。

（说明：翻译在保持专业性的同时优化了表述流畅度，关键术语如NOMA、RIS、SWIPT等采用通用译法并保留英文缩写，技术细节如CSI获取、端口策略等通过精准措辞确保准确性。段落结构对应原文逻辑，通过"本文从...逐步介绍..."等句式强化综述论文的学术规范感。）
